zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Dover於1198年之前出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，她的父親Fulbert De Dover Or Doure19歲，母親Isabel de Briwere13歲。她於大約1219年與Baron Richard Fitzroy在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1261年2月11日在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦貝茲利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Dover于1198年之前出生在英国英格兰肯特时，她的父亲Fulbert De Dover Or Doure19岁，母亲Isabel de Briwere13岁。她于大约1219年与Baron Richard Fitzroy在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1261年2月11日在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦貝茲利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dover
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either the port of Dover in Kent, named from the river on which it stands, Celtic dubrās meaning ‘the waters’ (which has become modern Welsh dwfr ‘water’), or Dover in Wigan, Lancashire.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhuidhir or Mac Duibhidhir; see Dwyer .
Americanized form of German   Dauer   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Dwyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Parnell, Liam, Brigid, Cormac, Oonagh, Patrick Michael.

Irish (southern Ireland): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhuidhir, a variant of Ó Duibhidhir (see Diver ), or Mac Duibhidhir ‘descendant of Duibhuidhir’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘dark, black’ + odhar ‘sallow, tawny’.

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Dover was born before 1198, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Fulbert De Dover Or Doure, was 19 and her mother, Isabel de Briwere, was 13. She married Baron Richard Fitzroy about 1219, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 11 February 1261, in her hometown, and was buried in Bexley, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Dover est née avant 1198, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulbert De Dover Or Doure, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Briwere, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Richard Fitzroy environ 1219, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1261, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Bexley, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Dover vor 1198 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulbert De Dover Or Doure 19 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Briwere 13. Sie hat um 1219 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Baron Richard Fitzroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Februar 1261 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bexley, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Dover è nata il prima del 1198 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Fulbert De Dover Or Doure, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Briwere, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Baron Richard Fitzroy circa 1219, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1261, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Bexley, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Doverが1198年以前にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Fulbert De Dover Or Doureは19歳，母Isabel de Briwereは13歳であった。約1219年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでBaron Richard Fitzroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年2月11日に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンベクスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Dover(이)가 1198년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulbert De Dover Or Doure(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Briwere(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Baron Richard Fitzroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 2월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 브스리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Dover nasceu antes 1198, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulbert De Dover Or Doure, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Briwere, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Richard Fitzroy aproximadamente 1219, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1261, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Bexley, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Dover родилась перед 1198 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Fulbert De Dover Or Doure было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Briwere, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Richard Fitzroy около 1219 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1261 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности бексли, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
